title: Southeastern Class 375 mtrv4
description: British Railway Southeaster Class 375 in mtrv4
body:
Introduced into service in 2000,these trains are owned by Eversholt Rail Group (formerly HSBC Rail) and leased to Southeastern for operation from London to Kent and parts of East Sussex.

The Class 375 is the principal train used by Southeastern, and replaced the slam-door Mark 1 derived stock, which was more than 40 years old and did not meet modern health and safety requirements and replaced the 16 Class 365s which were transferred to WAGN in 2004. All units have been converted from Tightlock to Dellner couplers.

This text is from wikipedia.

You can set the train length (in coaches) freely.

Next I will upload my train music resourcepack.
